# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  functionAppName: 
    type: string
    default: '<defaultFunctionAppName>'
  
resources:
  - name: {{copyIndex()}}-storageAccount
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    dependsOn: 
      - functionApp_Name   # Add the name of your Function App here
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      minimumTlsVersion: '1.2'
      enableHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      networkAcls:
        bypass: None
        virtualNetworkRules: []
        defaultAction: Allow 
  
  - name: {{copyIndex()}}-managedIdentity
    type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities
    apiVersion: '2018-11-30'
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      principalId: null
      clientId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
  
  - name: {{copyIndex()}}-roleAssignmentStorageAccount
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<<SUBSCRIPTION_ID>>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/8f9hdxta7u8jg4bfrad32nnameluidb5repo2fc2nrdmpp2r01'
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-30').principalId]"
      scope: "[concat(subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'), '/', variables('<<STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME>>'))]"
  
  - name: {{copyIndex()}}-roleAssignmentKeyVault
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<<SUBSCRIPTION_ID>>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b547cde7-f63d-41e2-8070-ce6a3ed2beab'
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>-30').principalId]"
      scope: "[concat(subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults'), '/', variables('<<KEY_VAULT_NAME>>'))]"  
  # Repeat this for CosmosDB and SQL as needed with respective role definitions
